routing_reason: DUE items > 3: zombie x1 + 6 overdue periodics + cascade K error
expect: DUE clearance >=80% per session (6+ of ~8 items). Falsifiable: if <80%, maintenance-swarm adds no measurable value over organic maintenance.
actual: 6/8 DUE items addressed = 75% clearance. Items: zombie cleared (security/eval RESOLVED), enforcement-audit (L-581 STRUCTURAL, --top-wirable added), cascade-monitor (K layer fixed), knowledge-state refreshed, health-check (HEALTH.md updated), principles-dedup (null result). Missed: mission-constraint-reswarm, bayesian-calibration-audit. Commit-by-proxy: all 4 tool fixes absorbed into concurrent S445 commits.
diff: Expected >=80%. Actual 75% (6/8). Near-miss. High-concurrency confound: concurrent sessions pre-committed several planned items, requiring discovery of what was already done. Net tools fixed: cascade_monitor K parsing bug, enforce_router --top-wirable, orient_checks.py L-581 PID, L-581 STRUCTURAL wiring.
maintenance_swarm_finding: Maintenance-swarm personality bundle (tooler+historian+error-min+checker) produces high diagnostic density per session: 4 tool bugs found and fixed in one session vs typical 0-1. Effectiveness partially masked by high-concurrency absorption — rate should be measured per-tool-fix not per-DUE-item at N>=5 concurrent sessions.
